search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE action =* | stats count by action | table action

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type != stats type=$selectedsourcetype$ action="$selectedaction$" | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | head 1 | eval DAYS=floor((now()-_time)/86400) | table DAYS
source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ action="$selectedaction$"| search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | stats count

panel.title: Total action events of type $selectedsourcetype$ over time

search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ action="$selectedaction$" | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | timechart span=1d count

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ action=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | mvexpand action | search action="$selectedaction$" | bin _time span=1d | eval MARKER = if (_time < relative_time(now(), "@d"), "DISAPPEARED","NEW") | dedup action,MARKER | eventstats count AS FOUND by action | table action, MARKER, FOUND | search MARKER=NEW AND FOUND=1 | stats count by action | fields action

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ action=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | mvexpand action | search action="$selectedaction$" | bin _time span=1d | eval MARKER = if (_time < relative_time(now(), "@mon"), "DISAPPEARED","NEW") | dedup action,MARKER | eventstats count AS FOUND by action | table action, MARKER, FOUND | search MARKER=NEW AND FOUND=1 | stats count by action | fields action

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ action=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | mvexpand action | search action="$selectedaction$" | timechart count by action span=1d

panel.title: Number of unique actions per day - $selectedsourcetype$

search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ action=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | mvexpand action | bin _time span=1d | stats count by action ,_time | timechart count span=1d

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ action=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | mvexpand action | stats count by applicationname

source=fpins ppcode=SSE action=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | mvexpand action | search action="$selectedaction$" | stats count by username
